user.title: Set up BfS ODL
user.description: Choose how the nearby measurement point search should determine your area.

manual_location.title: Manual position
manual_location.description: Enter coordinates to search for nearby measurement points.

select_stations.title: Select measurement points
select_stations.description: {candidate_count} nearby measurement points were found or suggested around {latitude}, {longitude}. Search radius: {radius} km.

thresholds.title: Assessment thresholds
thresholds.description: Define the lower and upper thresholds for the measurement assessment sensor. Defaults: {default_low} µSv/h and {default_high} µSv/h.

error.home_location_missing: No Home Assistant location is configured.
error.no_station_selected: Please select at least one measurement point.
error.invalid_coordinates: Invalid coordinates. Please check latitude and longitude.
error.invalid_thresholds: The lower threshold must be smaller than the upper threshold.

init.title: Configure BfS ODL
init.description: Adjust location, search radius and update interval.

manual_location.title: Manual position
manual_location.description: Enter coordinates to search for nearby measurement points.

select_stations.title: Select measurement points
select_stations.description: {candidate_count} nearby measurement points were found or suggested around {latitude}, {longitude}. Search radius: {radius} km.

thresholds.title: Assessment thresholds
thresholds.description: Adjust the lower and upper thresholds used by the measurement assessment sensor. Defaults: {default_low} µSv/h and {default_high} µSv/h.

error.home_location_missing: No Home Assistant location is configured.
error.no_station_selected: Please select at least one measurement point.
error.invalid_coordinates: Invalid coordinates. Please check latitude and longitude.
error.invalid_thresholds: The lower threshold must be smaller than the upper threshold.
